summary: Completed backend API and frontend integration testing for IHSG Smart Screener beta on public URL. Core flows passed: filters, sorting, detail sheet, feedback submit, waitlist submit, and collection summary refresh.
action_items: No blocking defects found in tested scope.
Optional: expand regression tests for more filter permutations and empty-state combinations.
critical_code_review_comments: No critical code issues found in reviewed files.
Data-testid coverage for key interactive elements is present for tested flows.
Note: /app/memory/test_credentials.md is present but empty; no auth tests were required in this task.
seed_data_creation: None. Frontend uses static IHSG seeded dataset (MOCKED DATASET ONLY), while feedback/waitlist persistence is real MongoDB.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Public URL tested: https://fundamental-checker.preview.emergentagent.com. Pytest suite added at /app/backend/tests/test_screener_api.py and all 5 tests passed. UI automation validated header/sidebar/table, quick filters, sorting, detail sheet charts, feedback submit, waitlist submit, and key data-testid visibility.
rca of the issue: No defects reproduced in this iteration.
